batch_grouping: within each modulo shard, contiguous position_in_shard groups of batch_size with fixed position_in_batch
noise_construction_protocol: for each manifest record create an independent torch.Generator on the recorded device, manual_seed(record.seed), draw one torch.randn tensor with the recorded shape/dtype, then stack in fixed batch position order; model-specific noise_scale is applied after construction
rng_algorithm: PyTorch Generator implementation selected by the recorded PyTorch version and generator device
